org.key_project.util.collection

Class ImmutableArray<S>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.key_project.util.collection.ImmutableArray<S>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Iterable<S>

    public class ImmutableArray<S>
extends Object
implements Iterable<S>, Serializable

    • Constructor Detail

      • ImmutableArray

        public ImmutableArray()
        creates an empty new Array

      • ImmutableArray

        public ImmutableArray(S... arr)
        creates a new Array
        Parameters:
        arr - the ProgrammElement array to wrap

      • ImmutableArray

        public ImmutableArray(List<S> list)
        creates a new Array
        Parameters:
        list - a LinkedList (order is preserved)

        public final S get(int pos)
        gets the element at the specified position

        returns the last element of the array
        Returns:
        the element at position size() - 1
